name: cc-tuner
description: Tune Claude Code's own configuration. Ships claude-md-writer (audit CLAUDE.md / .claude/rules/ memory against the official docs) and a usage statusline (rate-limit + context %, /cc-tuner:statusline-setup). Plus /execute-task, a gated task-lifecycle playbook (requires superpowers + cc-codex-triage); git-flow (canonical branch/commit/PR/board conventions + /cc-tuner:git-flow-setup rule installer).
